Class Snake

java.lang.Object
game.Snake
public class Snake extends Object
CLASS: Snake DESCRIPTION: The enemy snake that moves in a Space Invaders-like pattern. Starts at the top-right, moves left across the screen. When it hits the left boundary it drops one row and reverses to the right, and vice versa. Individual segments can be destroyed externally (remove from getSegments()). The snake keeps moving until it either touches the ship or every segment is destroyed, at which point a new, slightly longer and faster wave begins.

    Snake.Segment
    RUBRIC REQUIREMENT: Inner Class 2 Represents one square segment of the snake.

  • Field Details

    • SEGMENT_SIZE

      public static final int SEGMENT_SIZE
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • position

      public Point position

    • rotation

      public double rotation

  • Constructor Details

    • Snake

      public Snake(int length, double speed)
      Creates a snake with the given number of segments and movement speed. Segments are laid out horizontally from the right side of the screen.
      Parameters:
      shape - the polygon shape used for the segment
      position - the starting position of the segment
      rotation - the starting rotation of the segment
      dirX - the horizontal direction of movement
      dirY - the vertical direction of movement

  • Method Details

    • move

      public void move()
      Moves all segments by speed in the current direction, then checks boundaries and drops + reverses when a wall is reached.

    • paint

      public void paint(Graphics brush)
      Draws all remaining snake segments.
      Parameters:
      brush - the Graphics object used to draw the snake

    • isFullyDestroyed

      public boolean isFullyDestroyed()
      Returns true once every segment has been removed.
      Returns:
      true if no segments remain, false otherwise

    • collidesWithShip

      public boolean collidesWithShip(Ship ship)
      Checks whether any snake segment collides with the player's ship.
      Parameters:
      ship - the player's ship
      Returns:
      true if any segment collides with the ship, false otherwise

    • reachedBottom

      public boolean reachedBottom(double bottomY)
      Checks if any part of the snake has touched the bottom boundary
      Parameters:
      bottomY - the y-coordinate of the bottom boundary
      Returns:
      true if any segment has reached the boundary, false otherwise

    • getSegments

      public ArrayList<Snake.Segment> getSegments()
      Returns the list of snake segments so other game logic can inspect or remove them.
      Returns:
      the list of current snake segments

    • getSegmentCount

      public int getSegmentCount()
      Returns the current number of snake segments.
      Returns:
      the number of remaining segments

    • getPoints

      public Point[] getPoints()

    • contains

      public boolean contains(Point point)

    • rotate

      public void rotate(int degrees)

    • collides

      public boolean collides(game.Polygon other)
